compiled_state.title: Write RED test for doc-writer.md Output Scope section
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh (new file, must be chmod +x)
2. Source tests/lib/assert.sh for PASS/FAIL counters
3. Implement test_output_scope_section_present_before_input_requirements:
   - Find line number of '## Output Scope' and '## Input Requirements' in plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md
   - Assert Output Scope line number is less than Input Requirements line number
4. Implement test_output_scope_enumerates_dirs:
   - Extract section content between Output Scope and Input Requirements headers
   - Assert docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/ are all present in that section
5. Implement test_output_scope_has_halt_condition:
   - In the Output Scope section, assert text contains 'stop and report' (halt condition)
6. Implement test_output_scope_no_plugin_path_reference:
   - Assert grep -c 'plugins/dso' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md returns 0
7. Update .test-index: append to plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md entry:
   tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh [test_output_scope_section_present_before_input_requirements]

All 4 assertions must FAIL (RED) against the current unmodified doc-writer.md.

Given: doc-writer.md is read as text
When: content is checked for Output Scope section ordering, dir enumeration, halt condition, no plugin path
Then: all 4 assertions fail (section does not exist yet)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 4 test functions (section presence, dir enumeration, halt condition, no plugin path)
  Verify: grep -c '^test_output_scope' tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Running test against unmodified doc-writer.md produces at least 1 FAIL
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL:'
- [ ] .test-index entry for plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md includes test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh with RED marker
  Verify: grep 'plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md' .test-index | grep -q 'test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh \[test_output_scope'
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes (RED marker gates the failing test through pre-commit)
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

comments.body: SUSPENDED: This task (T1 for story 50d5-ac2e — add plugin boundary constraint to doc-writer.md) was suspended after implementation was started. The done definitions require hardcoding 'plugins/dso/' inside doc-writer.md, which is a distributed plugin file. The implementation is architecturally wrong. Reverted commit 3eacc31c. Story 50d5-ac2e escalated to brainstorm for re-examination.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
TASK_REVISION: Revised per REPLAN on story 50d5-ac2e. Original task tested for NEVER+plugins/dso prohibition in doc-writer.md — that approach was architecturally incorrect (distributing DSO-project-specific paths in plugin files). Revised to test the Output Scope section with host-agnostic positive enumeration.

New scope:
- Create tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh (new dedicated test file)
- Test functions:
  1. test_output_scope_section_present_before_input_requirements: verifies '## Output Scope' exists in doc-writer.md AND appears before '## Input Requirements' by line number
  2. test_output_scope_enumerates_dirs: verifies docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/ all appear in the Output Scope section
  3. test_output_scope_has_halt_condition: verifies 'stop and report' (or halt-equivalent language) appears in the Output Scope section
  4. test_output_scope_no_plugin_path_reference: verifies 'plugins/dso' does not appear anywhere in doc-writer.md as a path prohibition
- Update .test-index: add tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh [test_output_scope_section_present_before_input_requirements] to the plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md entry
- All assertions must FAIL (RED) against current doc-writer.md (no Output Scope section exists yet)

testing_mode: RED
comments.author: Test

comments.body: INFEASIBILITY_CATEGORY: documentation. JUSTIFICATION: Task requests content-presence and ordering assertions on plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md, a non-executable LLM agent definition file. Rule 5 of the behavioral testing standard prohibits grep-based content assertions on instruction file body text. No behavioral surface exists to test. Closed without implementation per red-test-evaluator VERDICT:CONFIRM.
comments.author: Test
